title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 491.260 - Application of prosecuting officers
text:
491.260.  Application of prosecuting officers. — When such application shall be made by the attorney general, prosecuting or circuit attorney, or other public prosecutor, it shall not be necessary to swear to the truth of the facts set forth in the application.
(RSMo 1939 § 1912) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1748; 1919 § 5435; 1909 § 6379
